topWPAPlays.description: Luke Maile homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field. Starling Marte scores. Tyler Tolbert scores.
Alec Bohm doubles (14) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. Trea Turner scores. Bryce Harper to 3rd.
Nick Loftin singles on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Marsh. Jac Caglianone scores. Nick Loftin to 2nd.
Starling Marte singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Edmundo Sosa. Nick Loftin scores. Starling Marte to 2nd.
Brandon Marsh strikes out swinging.
José Caballero homers (9) on a fly ball to left center field. Jasson Domínguez scores. Jazz Chisholm Jr. scores.
Richie Palacios singles on a line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Chandler Simpson scores.
José Caballero homers (10) on a fly ball to left center field.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. walks. Jasson Domínguez to 2nd.
Cedric Mullins flies out to right fielder Jasson Domínguez.
Jose Altuve homers (9) on a fly ball to left field. Braden Shewmake scores. Brice Matthews scores.
CJ Abrams homers (19) on a line drive to right field. Luis García Jr. scores. Curtis Mead scores.
James Wood hits a grand slam (24) to center field. Dylan Crews scores. Jacob Young scores. Nasim Nuñez scores.
Curtis Mead homers (15) on a fly ball to left center field.
Brice Matthews homers (7) on a line drive to left field. Yainer Diaz scores. Braden Shewmake scores.
Juan Soto homers (19) on a fly ball to right field. Tyrone Taylor scores. Ronny Mauricio scores.
Luis Torrens doubles (10) on a line drive to left fielder Jorge Mateo. Bo Bichette scores. Jared Young scores.
Matt Olson homers (24) on a line drive to left field. Ozzie Albies scores.
Mauricio Dubón grounds into a force out, shortstop Ronny Mauricio to second baseman Brett Baty. Jorge Mateo out at 2nd.
Bo Bichette lines into a double play, third baseman Austin Riley to second baseman Ozzie Albies. A.J. Ewing out at 2nd.
David Hamilton doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Garrett Mitchell scores. Sal Frelick scores. Cooper Pratt to 3rd.
Brice Turang singles on a line drive to left fielder Lars Nootbaar. Joey Ortiz scores. Christian Yelich scores. Jackson Chourio to 2nd.
Masyn Winn singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Nathan Church pops out to third baseman Joey Ortiz.
Sal Frelick hits a ground-rule double (14) on a line drive to right field. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd.
Max Kepler homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Gabriel Moreno scores. Lourdes Gurriel Jr. scores.

Max Kepler singles on a line drive to left fielder Samad Taylor. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Max Kepler to 2nd. Max Kepler advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by left fielder Samad Taylor.
Ketel Marte triples (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Lourdes Gurriel Jr. singles on a ground ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Corbin Carroll scores. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.
Nolan Arenado grounds out softly, pitcher Walker Buehler to first baseman Gavin Sheets.
Heliot Ramos triples (3) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Heliot Ramos scores. Throwing error by shortstop Andrés Giménez.
Jung Hoo Lee singles on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Rafael Devers to 3rd.
Kazuma Okamoto homers (20) on a fly ball to left center field.
Victor Bericoto singles on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Rafael Devers scores. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Willy Adames to 3rd.
Kazuma Okamoto grounds out, third baseman Casey Schmitt to first baseman Bryce Eldridge.
Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, pitcher Edgardo Henriquez to second baseman Tommy Edman to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Willi Castro out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.

Dodgers challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Rockies challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Cole Carrigg doubles (5) on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Willi Castro scores. Brett Sullivan scores. Hunter Goodman out at home on the throw, center fielder Andy Pages to second baseman Miguel Rojas to catcher Dalton Rushing.
Mookie Betts reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Edouard Julien. Andy Pages scores.
Teoscar Hernández lines into a double play, pitcher Jimmy Herget to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Kyle Tucker out at 1st.
Shohei Ohtani homers (19) on a fly ball to left center field. Dalton Rushing scores.
